name: sagip
description: Sagip — set aside money for the people you love, on Stellar.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w client-frontend" "npm run dev -w server-backend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server-backend && npm run build -w client-frontend
scripts.start: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,magenta "npm run start -w client-frontend" "npm run start -w server-backend"
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w client-frontend && npm run lint -w server-backend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w client-frontend && npm run typecheck -w server-backend
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run audit:instawards
